name: enCore Energy Corp.
summary: Part I and Properties Our Company enCore Energy Corp., Americas Clean Energy Company, was incorporated on October 30, 2009, under the Laws of British Columbia and is a reporting issuer in all of the provinces and territories of Canada. As of January 1, 2025, the Company ceased to be a foreign private issuer and has become a domestic issuer.
